hero.description: Banditos Bar & Kitchen is a Towson restaurant with direct bar, takeout, and late-night signals in the approved source set. Keep it in the mix when the plan may shift from dinner into drinks or when you want a later meal option with takeout still available as a fallback. The useful decision here is format and timing, not assumed neighborhood vibe or unsupported dining claims.

what_they_do.summary: This listing fits a bar-forward casual meal more than a one-note sit-down dinner plan. The source-backed signals support a flexible late-day stop that can work for a later meal, a drinks-first plan, or a takeout-backed decision when you want to confirm fit by phone.

items: Takeout-backed fallback if plans stay flexible
Direct phone confirmation before you commit
Use it when dinner may turn into drinks and you want one restaurant option that can stay flexible.
Use it when you want a later meal choice instead of an early, family-first, or quiet dinner assumption.
Use it when takeout is still on the table and you want to confirm current fit by phone before heading over.
This Banditos listing is anchored to the approved Towson Chamber-derived record for 31 Allegheny Avenue in Towson.
Local wording for this page should stay at the Towson plus street-address level unless newer approved Towson locality authority is added.
Do not render downtown, social-cluster, or nightlife-district framing from this artifact.
